query: INSERT INTO provider_revision_capabilities (provider_revision_model_id, operation, surface, mode, source, certified_at) SELECT prm.id, mc.operation, mc.surface, mc.mode, mc.source, mc.certified_at FROM provider_revision_models prm JOIN model_capabilities mc ON mc.provider_model_id = prm.source_provider_model_id WHERE prm.provider_revision_id = $1
